title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners:
Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners!
